title: VaultResultMediation
description: Capability-track constant-shape output for MEDIATION purpose. Max entropy: 13 bits.

a_move.description: Recommended move for party A (8 values = 3.00 bits)

b_move.description: Recommended move for party B (8 values = 3.00 bits)

conflict_type.description: Classification of conflict type (5 values = ~2.32 bits)

x-vcav-prompt-instruction: Based on this mediation conversation, assess the situation and recommend next moves.
x-vcav-prompt-output-format:
Respond with valid JSON using ONLY these values:
- outcome: "PROGRESS" | "STUCK" | "ESCALATE"
- a_move: "ACKNOWLEDGE" | "RESTATE_NEEDS" | "OFFER_REPAIR" | "REQUEST_CLARITY" | "REQUEST_ACKNOWLEDGMENT" | "SET_BOUNDARY" | "PROPOSE_COMPROMISE" | "NONE"
- b_move: (same options as a_move)
- shared_move: "ENUMERATE_CONTRIBUTIONS" | "SET_GROUND_RULES" | "TIMEBOX" | "PAUSE" | "SEEK_EXTERNAL_INPUT" | "NONE"
- conflict_type: "RECOGNITION" | "RESOURCE" | "PROCESS" | "VALUES" | "UNKNOWN"
$comment: Total entropy: ~12.48 bits. Capability-track labels intentionally exclude reserved expansion slots.
